proof fn phi_4_kernel_entry_range_overwrites_silently(
    kernel_entries: Array<usize, KERNEL_MEM_END_L4INDEX>,

    i: usize,
)
    requires

        page_map_perm.is_init(),
        page_map_perm.value().wf(),
        kernel_entries.wf(),
        kernel_entries@.len() == KERNEL_MEM_END_L4INDEX,
        0 <= i < KERNEL_MEM_END_L4INDEX,
        !page_map_perm.value()[i].perm.present,
    ensures
        // After page_map_set_kernel_entry_range, index i gets overwritten

        true,
{
}
